svg.title: myexpensio onboarding flow diagram
svg.desc: Step-by-step flow from admin sending an invite through to a user submitting their first claim

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does an admin create an invite in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('What does a user do when they receive a myexpensio invite?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the invite token is expired or invalid?')
sendPrompt('What is org membership in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('What does the user see on first login in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('How does a user configure their rates in myexpensio settings?')
sendPrompt('How do I record my first trip in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('How do I create a claim in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a claim is submitted in myexpensio?')
sendPrompt('How does an admin review submitted claims?')
sendPrompt('How does exporting work in myexpensio?')

svg.text: Tap any node to ask a question
